sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports hypertension and diabetes. He also reports intermittent dizziness, worse with standing. He denies chest pain or shortness of breath. The patient smokes one to two cigarettes a day and reports decreased smoking.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure is 142/88 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable. A two out of six systolic murmur is auscultated. AST is elevated at 39 U/L.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's primary problems are hypertension, diabetes, and orthostatic hypotension. The murmur is concerning for valvular disease.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a cervical MRI. Recommend increased oral hydration and slow positional changes. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to treatment and monitor blood pressure.
